channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Key Highlights and Political Tensions in Trump’s 2026 State of the Union Address
item.description: President Donald Trump delivered his 2026 State of the Union address in what became the longest speech of its kind, presenting a forceful defense of his administration’s policies while confronting a s...

item.title: Trump targets Iran's leaders with missile strikes amid heightened tensions over nuclear threat
item.description: Donald Trump has condemned Iran's leadership for a prolonged history of violence, including its support for terrorism and military actions against the United States and its allies. Following weeks of ...

item.title: Welsh Parliament Approves Consent for Assisted Dying Legislation
item.description: The Senedd in Wales has approved a legislative consent motion that allows the implementation of assisted dying services within the NHS, pending final approval from Westminster. The vote followed a hig...

item.title: Japan Sets 2030 Timeline for Surface-to-Air Missile Deployment on Yonaguni Island Amid China Tensions
item.description: Japan has announced plans to deploy medium-range surface-to-air missiles on its westernmost island, Yonaguni, by fiscal year 2030, which ends in March 2031. Defence Minister Shinjiro Koizumi confirmed...

item.title: How Families Are Sharing Costs as Adult Children Return Home Amid Rising Rents
item.description: As high rents continue to strain the finances of young adults, many are returning to the family home, prompting a new dynamic in family finances. Tricia Carter, a 63-year-old living in south London, c...

item.title: Drone Warfare Intensifies in Sudan’s Kordofan Region as Civilian Toll Mounts
item.description: Sudan’s civil war has entered a new and deadly phase as intensified drone attacks reshape the battlefield in the south-central Kordofan region. Nearly three years after fighting erupted in April 2023 ...

item.title: Airlines Suspend Flights in the Middle East Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: Several major international airlines, including Air France, British Airways, Lufthansa, and KLM, have begun canceling flights to and from key Middle Eastern countries, including Israel, Saudi Arabia, ...

item.title: Epstein Survivors Demand Accountability, Reject Claims of Trump's Exoneration
item.description: The ongoing investigations into the Epstein affair have sparked heated debates, particularly regarding the involvement of high-profile figures like Donald Trump. Republican Representatives Nancy Mace ...

item.title: O2 Becomes First UK Network to Offer Starlink Satellite Access for Rural Customers
item.description: O2 has become the first mobile network in the UK to enable satellite connectivity for its users, using Elon Musk's Starlink technology. This new service will automatically connect customers to Starlin...

item.title: Merz Visits China Amid Growing Concerns Over Germany’s Expanding Trade Deficit
item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz has arrived in Beijing for his first official visit to China, accompanied by a significant business delegation, as Germany faces mounting concerns over a widening trad...

item.title: US and Israel Target Iran with Missiles Amid Heightened Tensions
item.description: On the morning of Saturday, 28 February 2026, Israel and the United States launched a daylight missile strike on Iran, following weeks of escalating tensions between the US and the Iranian regime. The...

item.title: US and Israel Launch Coordinated Airstrike on Iran Over Nuclear Threat
item.description: The United States and Israel have launched a joint missile strike on Iran, with US President Donald Trump declaring it a crucial step to prevent Iran from acquiring nuclear weapons. In a televised mes...

item.title: Mexico's Navy Seizes Narco-Submarine with 4 Tons of Cocaine in Major Drug Bust
item.description: In a significant operation, the Mexican Navy has intercepted a semi-submersible vessel, also known as a 'narco-submarine,' carrying nearly four tons of cocaine. The seizure, which occurred near Manzan...

item.title: Women warn that drink spiking can occur in rural areas as well as cities
item.description: Two women from rural Wales have come forward to share their experiences of drink spiking, highlighting that the crime is not limited to large cities. Tirion Richards, 31, from Brechfa, experienced sev...

item.title: Flights Suspended from Dubai and Doha Amid Escalating Tensions in the Middle East
item.description: Following a series of US and Israeli strikes on Iran, significant travel disruptions have occurred across the Gulf region. Both Dubai and Doha airports, major international hubs, have suspended flight...

item.title: Trump emphasizes achievements and policy priorities in State of the Union address
item.description: Donald Trump delivered a combative State of the Union address, framing the United States as experiencing a historic economic and social turnaround. He highlighted rising incomes, a growing stock marke...

item.title: Trump Emphasizes Immigration and Economic Record in State of the Union Address
item.description: US President Donald Trump delivered a lengthy State of the Union address at the US Capitol, lasting nearly one hour and 48 minutes, in which he highlighted what he described as the major achievements ...

item.title: Former Nigerian Oil Minister Faces Court Over Alleged Bribery from Oil Executives
item.description: Diezani Alison-Madueke, former Nigerian Minister of Petroleum Resources, is facing trial in the UK over allegations of accepting bribes from two Nigerian oil tycoons, Olajide Omokore and Kolawole Aluk...

item.title: Serie A Faces Possible Absence from Champions League Last 16 After Inter Exit
item.description: Italian football is facing the possibility of having no representatives in the Champions League last 16 for the first time in nearly four decades. Since 1987-88, at least one Italian club has reached ...

item.title: CDC Struggles with Leadership Gaps Amid Ongoing Changes
item.description: The U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) is currently experiencing significant leadership turmoil, following a law change in 2023 that requires the CDC director to be confirmed by the...
